# PR Checklist (Medical-Adjacent)

- [ ] I confirm this PR contains **no** PHI/PII, patient data, or identifiers.
- [ ] I confirm this PR contains **no** clinical claims or medical advice.
- [ ] I confirm third-party materials are not included unless redistribution rights are clear and compatible.
- [ ] If this PR affects stimulus generation, timing, intensity, or rendering, I included a short risk note and verification steps.
- [ ] I have read and agree to the CLA in `CLA.md`.
